evals.prompt: run a security audit on my node project
evals.expected_output: Creates an isolated worktree, runs npm/yarn/pnpm audit, categorizes vulnerabilities by severity, applies fixes where possible, commits the changes, opens a PR with a security report showing before/after vulnerability counts

assertions.name: creates-worktree
assertions.description: Creates a git worktree on a dedicated branch before making any changes

assertions.name: runs-audit-command
assertions.description: Runs the appropriate audit command (npm audit, yarn audit, pnpm audit) for the detected package manager

assertions.name: skips-install-for-audit
assertions.description: Does NOT run npm/yarn/pnpm install before the audit (audit reads from lock files)

assertions.name: default-severity-filter
assertions.description: Applies Critical+High severity filter by default when user hasn't specified one

assertions.name: cleans-up-worktree
assertions.description: Removes the worktree at the end, even if no vulnerabilities were found or no PR was created

evals.expected_output: Shows the interactive help summary (js-deps description, argument syntax, workflow options) and presents the workflow selection question using AskUserQuestion

assertions.name: shows-help-summary
assertions.description: Displays the js-deps help summary including supported package managers and workflow descriptions

assertions.name: asks-workflow-question
assertions.description: Presents the workflow selection question (Update dependencies vs Security fixes only) via AskUserQuestion

assertions.name: no-worktree-created
assertions.description: Does not create a worktree or start any workflow before the user answers

evals.prompt: update all my js packages to the latest versions
evals.expected_output: Creates worktree, installs deps, runs outdated check, applies Patch+Minor+Major filter (user said 'latest'), updates packages, validates (build/lint/test), commits with major versions noted in message, opens PR

assertions.name: creates-worktree
assertions.description: Creates a git worktree on a dedicated branch

assertions.name: installs-before-outdated
assertions.description: Runs npm/yarn/pnpm install before running the outdated check

assertions.name: major-version-filter
assertions.description: Applies Patch+Minor+Major filter (includes all updates) because user said 'latest'

assertions.name: validates-after-update
assertions.description: Runs build/lint/test validation after updating packages

assertions.name: commit-notes-major-bumps
assertions.description: Commit message notes major version changes (e.g. 'chore: update dependencies (major: pkg vX->Y)')

evals.expected_output: Creates worktree, targets only the three named packages, installs deps only in directories containing those packages, checks for outdated versions, updates them, validates, creates PR

assertions.name: creates-worktree
assertions.description: Creates a git worktree on a dedicated branch

assertions.name: targets-specific-packages
assertions.description: Only updates react, react-dom, and @types/react — not all packages

assertions.name: filters-install-directories
assertions.description: Only installs dependencies in directories where at least one of the named packages appears

assertions.name: interactive-help-for-version-scope
assertions.description: Asks the user about version scope (patch/minor/major) via AskUserQuestion since no scope was specified

evals.prompt: fix only critical security vulnerabilities in my project
evals.expected_output: Creates worktree, runs audit, filters to Critical severity only, fixes those packages, creates PR with report

assertions.name: creates-worktree
assertions.description: Creates a git worktree on a dedicated branch

assertions.name: critical-only-filter
assertions.description: Applies Critical-only severity filter without asking — user specified 'critical' inline

assertions.name: skips-high-moderate-low
assertions.description: Does not attempt to fix High, Moderate, or Low vulnerabilities

assertions.name: skips-install-for-audit
assertions.description: Does not run npm install before auditing
